response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy requiring ~15 years of experience, recognized AI expertise, and cloud/AI platform leadership. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, no strategic advisory or principal-level leadership track record, and only light recent exposure to AI-agent tooling. Cloud depth is also limited (AWS CDK mentioned once). Fit for a Principal/Director AI strategy role is weak.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded and infra
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong community/teaching footprint via talks, workshops and OSS projects
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope, strategy or advisory experience
Limited deep cloud platform expertise expected for this role

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
No principal/director-level strategic IC track record
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
